---
title: "SPT"
---

## Time to Complete Student Perceptions of Teaching

::: {style="font-size: large"}
To access and complete an online SPT:

-   In your web browser, preferably Google Chrome, go [here](www.uwindsor.ca/uwinsitestudent) ( www.uwindsor.ca/uwinsitestudent).
-   Click the blue [SIGN IN TO UWINSITE STUDENT]{style="color: blue;"} button.
-   On the Sign in screen, enter (or select) your UWinID\@uwindsor.ca. Click the Next button.
-   On the Enter password screen, enter your UWin Account password. Click the Sign in button.
-   On your Student Homepage in UWinsite Student, click the My Academics tile.
-   Click Student Perception of Teaching in the left navigation menu.
-   Select the appropriate term and click the Continue button.
-   In the STUDENT PERCEPTION OF TEACHING box, click the Start button. PLEASE SELECT YOUR INSTRUCTOR'S NAME WHEN COMPLETING THE SPT.

Follow the instructions within the SPT in order to complete and submit.
:::
